mapper.insert:
SELECT 'FILE' || LPAD(NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(FILE_ID, 5))), 0) + 1, 10, '0') fileId FROM EVA_FILE
Insert All
Into EVA_FILE (FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, ORG_FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, INPT_DT, INPT_ID, INPT_USR_PERM) values (#{fileId}, #{item.fileSeq}, #{item.filePath}, #{fileId} || '_' || #{item.fileName}, #{item.orgFileName}, #{item.fileSize}, sysdate, #{item.regstUsrId}, #{item.regstUsrPerm})
select * from dual

INSERT INTO EVA_FILE (FILE_ID, FILE_SEQ, FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, ORG_FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, INPT_DT, INPT_ID, INPT_USR_PERM) values (#{fileId}, #{fileSeq}, #{filePath}, #{fileId} || '_' || #{fileName}, #{orgFileName}, #{fileSize}, sysdate, #{regstUsrId}, #{regstUsrPerm})
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_SEQ , FILE_PATH , FILE_NAME , ORG_FILE_NAME , FILE_SIZE , INPT_ID , INPT_USR_PERM FROM EVA_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT FILE_ID , FILE_SEQ , FILE_PATH , FILE_NAME , ORG_FILE_NAME , FILE_SIZE , INPT_ID , INPT_USR_PERM FROM EVA_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY FILE_SEQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EVA_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND FILE_SEQ = #{fileSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT HIS_NO , MENU_NO , MENU_NM , WORK_TYPE , FUNC_NM , UNIV_NM , RMRK , RESULT_TYPE , LINK , PRIVACY_YN , PRIVACY_INFO , INPT_DT , INPT_ID , INPT_NM , INPT_USR_NO , LAST_CHG_DT , TO_CHAR(INPT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') INPT_DT_STR , TO_CHAR(LAST_CHG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LAST_CHG_DT_STR , USR_IP , SESSION_ID , URI , PARAM , RESULT FROM EVA_HIS WHERE HIS_NO = #{HIS_NO}

SELECT SBJT.UNIV_CD , UNIV.UNIV_NM , UNIV.UNIV_TYPE_CD , (SELECT CODE_NM FROM EVA_CODE WHERE CODE = UNIV.UNIV_TYPE_CD) UNIV_TYPE_NM , UNIV.EVA_TARGET EVA_TARGET , (SELECT CODE_NM FROM EVA_CODE WHERE CODE = UNIV.EVA_TARGET) EVA_TARGET_NM FROM EVA_SCSBJT SBJT INNER JOIN EVA_UNIV UNIV ON SBJT.UNIV_CD = UNIV.UNIV_CD GROUP BY SBJT.UNIV_CD, UNIV.UNIV_NM, UNIV.UNIV_TYPE_CD, UNIV.EVA_TARGET ORDER BY UNIV.UNIV_NM
SELECT UNIV.UNIV_CD , UNIV.UNIV_NM , UNIV.UNIV_TYPE_CD , (SELECT CODE_NM FROM EVA_CODE WHERE CODE = UNIV.UNIV_TYPE_CD) UNIV_TYPE_NM FROM EVA_UNIV UNIV WHERE UNIV.UNIV_CD = #{value}
SELECT UNIV_NM FROM EVA_UNIV WHERE UNIV_CD = #{univCd}
SELECT UNIV_CD , UNIV_NM , DOMAIN , EVA_TARGET , UNIV_TYPE_CD FROM EVA_UNIV WHERE UNIV_CD = #{univCd}
SELECT USR_NM FROM EVA_USR WHERE USR_NO = #{usrNo}
SELECT CASE WHEN #{univCd} || #{scsbjtNo} = #{univCd} || '-9999' THEN '99999999' ELSE TRAN_CORS_CD END TRAN_CORS_CD FROM EVA_SCSBJT2 WHERE SCSBJT_NO = #{scsbjtNo} AND UNIV_CD = #{univCd}

SELECT TRAN_CORS_CD , (SELECT CODE_NM FROM EVA_CODE WHERE CODE = SBJT.TRAN_CORS_CD) TRAN_CORS_NM FROM EVA_SCSBJT SBJT WHERE UNIV_CD = #{value} AND ABOL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY TRAN_CORS_CD ORDER BY TRAN_CORS_CD
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVA_SCSBJT WHERE UNIV_CD = #{univCd} AND SCSBJT_NO = #{scsbjtNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVA_SCSBJT2 WHERE UNIV_CD = #{univCd} AND SCSBJT_NO = #{scsbjtNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE EVA_FILE SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_ID , USR_NO , USR_ID , USR_NM , USR_PERM_NM , UNIV_NM , CERT_NUM , INPT_DT , LAST_ACCESS_DT FROM EVA_LOGIN_USR WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessId} AND USR_NM = #{usrNm}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EVA_LOGIN_USR WHERE NOT (((SYSDATE-LAST_ACCESS_DT) * (24 * 60 * 60)) BETWEEN 0 AND MAX_INTERVAL)
mapper.select: SELECT UNIV.EVA_TARGET CODE , (SELECT CODE_NM FROM EVA_CODE WHERE CODE = UNIV.EVA_TARGET) CODE_NM FROM EVA_SCSBJT2 SBJT INNER JOIN EVA_UNIV UNIV ON SBJT.UNIV_CD = UNIV.UNIV_CD WHERE SBJT.LAST_YN = 'Y' AND SBJT.CYCL_CD = #{cyclCd} GROUP BY UNIV.EVA_TARGET ORDER BY UNIV.EVA_TARGET
SELECT MENU_NM FROM EVA_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = #{value}
